Name: Average time from SW-Reviewer Agreed to SW-EIC Reject
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-EIC Reject'

Name: Total time between SW-Awaiting EIC Decision and SW-EIC Reject
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' and activity 'SW-EIC Reject'

Name: Minimum time it takes SW-EIC Reject to be performed after SW-Awaiting EIC Decision
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' and activity 'SW-EIC Reject'

Name: Total resolution time of SW-EIC Reject in variants that include SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-EIC Reject' and the end of case where activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed occurs

Name: Time from SW-Reviewer Agreed to SW-EIC Reject compared to time from SW-Reviewer Declined to SW-EIC Reject
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-EIC Reject'

Name: Elapsed time between SW-AE Recommendation overdue and SW-EIC Reject
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Recommendation overdue' and activity 'SW-EIC Reject'

Name: Average waiting time to the SW-EIC Reject after the last reviewer response (e.g., SW-Reviewer Agreed or SW-Reviewer No Response)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-EIC Reject'

Name: Time of SW-EIC Reject in cases where the variant includes multiple rounds of revision versus single-round variants
Metric: The average of the duration between activity SW-EIC Reject and the end of the case

Name: Total time from Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation to SW-EIC Reject in variants that contain SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-EIC Reject'

Name: Average time it takes SW-EIC Reject to be executed after the final SW-Awaiting EIC Decision occurrence in a case
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' and activity 'SW-EIC Reject'

Name: Time from SW-Reviewer Selection is now due to SW-EIC Reject in rejected manuscripts
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is now due' and activity 'SW-EIC Reject'

Name: Total time between Plagiarism Originality Report Completed and SW-EIC Reject in variants leading to rejection without reviewer agreement
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed' and activity 'SW-EIC Reject'

Name: Cycle Time of SW-EIC Reject measured from the moment the manuscript enters SW-Awaiting EIC Decision until SW-EIC Reject is logged
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' and activity 'SW-EIC Reject'

Minimum time between SW–Major Revision due in 1 week and SW-EIC Reject
